notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Patrick Wisdom. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Julio Rodríguez to 2nd. Julio Rodríguez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Riley Greene.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones flies out to center fielder Julio Rodríguez.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, third baseman Patrick Wisdom to first baseman Josh Naylor.

notableEvents.label: Matt Vierling pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling grounds out, third baseman Patrick Wisdom to first baseman Josh Naylor. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Wenceel Pérez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kevin McGonigle walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Robles, deflected by second baseman Cole Young. Zach McKinstry scores. Wenceel Pérez scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Patrick Wisdom. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Patrick Wisdom. Zach McKinstry to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Emerson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Colt Emerson hit by pitch. Josh Naylor scores. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Patrick Wisdom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds out, third baseman Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Tigers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: catcher Dillon Dingler picks off Randy Arozarena at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Robles, deflected by second baseman Cole Young. Zach McKinstry scores. Wenceel Pérez scores.
